task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct Jitsi Meet room URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser's address bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/TownHall_2024_Auditor' and the Jitsi Meet pre-join (lobby) screen is visible.
The text 'Silent_Observer' is entered into the display name input field on the pre-join screen.
The microphone icon on the pre-join screen is toggled off (typically appears red with a diagonal slash through it).
The camera/video icon on the pre-join screen is toggled off (typically appears red with a diagonal slash through it).

task_completion.description: Join the meeting with the configured state
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent has progressed past the pre-join screen into the actual meeting interface. The main meeting UI is visible, and the bottom toolbar confirms the microphone and camera are still disabled.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet application via a web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) rendering the Jitsi Meet interface, rather than terminal windows executing API requests or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Jitsi Meet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Jitsi Meet UI, and the URL bar points to the localhost server rather than a local file path (file://) or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser Developer Tools (Inspect Element) panels open to artificially inject the display name or alter the CSS states of the mic/camera icons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: http://localhost:8080. Target Room: 'TownHall_2024_Auditor'. Target Display Name: 'Silent_Observer'. The agent must configure the pre-join screen to mute the microphone and disable the camera before joining the meeting.
